projects.name: MyQRLWallet
projects.description: A web wallet for QRL 2.0 that lets users create accounts and manage transactions on the quantum-resistant ledger.

projects.name: QRL Hub
projects.description: A community-maintained educational website covering QRL, quantum computing threats, blockchain security, quantum news, and QRL 2.0 updates.

projects.name: ZondScan
projects.description: A QRL Zond network explorer for browsing blocks, transactions, smart contracts, validators, addresses, and chain activity.
